name: 3D Card Effect
description: A card perspective effect, hover over the card to elevate card elements.
animation_description: Card tilts in 3D space following mouse position with perspective transform. Inner elements float upward with varying translateZ depths on hover. Smooth spring transition on enter/exit.
usage_example:
